---
title: "Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle"
author: Your name
institute: Universitat de Lleida - Escola Politècnica Superior
format: revealjs
footer: "Footer"
---

## Slide

This is a slide.

## Slide 2 {.smaller}

This is a small slide

## Code

```{.java}
print("Code!")
```

## Columns
::: {.columns}
::: {.column}
column 1
:::
::: {.column}
column 2
:::
:::

## Math

This is $inline math$

$$
This is not inline math
$$

# Big slide!
